requirements.title: Establish Cyber Resilience Framework
requirements.description: Establish and maintain a CRF covering the five IPDRR phases aligned with regulatory expectations and international standards.

requirements.title: CRF Scope and Applicability
requirements.description: Define CRF scope covering all technology assets, digital services, third-party connections, and cloud environments.

requirements.title: CRF Annual Review
requirements.description: Conduct annual review of the CRF to ensure alignment with evolving threat landscape and business changes.

requirements.title: Dedicated Cyber Risk Management Function
requirements.description: Establish a dedicated cyber risk management function with adequate staffing, skills, budget, and organisational authority.

requirements.title: Cyber Risk Function Resourcing
requirements.description: Allocate sufficient budget and human resources to the cyber risk function commensurate with the institution's risk profile.

requirements.title: CISO Appointment and Reporting Line
requirements.description: Appoint a CISO with direct reporting line to senior management and regular access to board-level discussions.

requirements.title: Board Cyber Risk Reporting
requirements.description: Provide regular cyber risk reports to the board covering risk posture, threat landscape, incidents, and improvement initiatives.

requirements.title: Cyber Risk Appetite Statement
requirements.description: Define and maintain a cyber risk appetite statement approved by the board and reviewed at least annually.

requirements.title: Threat Escalation Matrix
requirements.description: Maintain an escalation matrix defining severity levels, notification timelines, and escalation paths for cyber threats.

requirements.title: Independent Cyber Risk Assessment
requirements.description: Conduct periodic independent assessments of the institution's cyber risk posture by qualified external parties.

requirements.title: NCII Asset Inventory
requirements.description: Maintain a complete inventory of all assets designated as National Critical Information Infrastructure with classification and dependency mapping.

requirements.title: NACSA Directive Compliance
requirements.description: Comply with all applicable NACSA directives and standards for NCII-designated systems and services.

requirements.title: NCII Additional Security Measures
requirements.description: Implement additional security measures as directed by NACSA or BNM with documented impact assessments and implementation plans.

requirements.title: Network Zone Definition and Segmentation
requirements.description: Define and implement network security zones with appropriate segmentation controls between DMZ, internal, restricted, and management networks.

requirements.title: Network Architecture Documentation
requirements.description: Maintain up-to-date network architecture diagrams showing all zones, interconnections, and security controls.

requirements.title: Server-to-Server Encrypted Communication
requirements.description: Encrypt all server-to-server communications using TLS 1.2 or higher with mutual authentication for sensitive data flows.

requirements.title: Secure Remote Access with MFA
requirements.description: Implement secure remote access using VPN with multi-factor authentication and endpoint compliance verification.

requirements.title: Firewall Deployment at Critical Segments
requirements.description: Deploy next-generation firewalls at all critical network segments with application-aware rule sets and regular review.

requirements.title: Firewall Rule Base Review
requirements.description: Review firewall rule bases at least quarterly to remove unused rules, validate business justification, and ensure least privilege.

requirements.title: IPS Deployment and Monitoring
requirements.description: Deploy IPS at strategic network points with updated signatures and 24x7 alert monitoring.

requirements.title: Web Content Filtering
requirements.description: Implement web proxy with content filtering to block access to malicious websites and enforce acceptable use policy.

requirements.title: Email Security Gateway
requirements.description: Deploy email security gateway with anti-spam, anti-malware, attachment sandboxing, and phishing protection capabilities.

requirements.title: Endpoint Detection and Response
requirements.description: Deploy EDR solution on all endpoints with centralised management, real-time monitoring, and automated response capabilities.

requirements.title: Full Disk Encryption on Endpoints
requirements.description: Implement full disk encryption on all endpoint devices with centralised key management and compliance monitoring.

requirements.title: APT Detection Solution
requirements.description: Deploy APT detection and prevention solutions including network sandboxing and advanced malware analysis capabilities.

requirements.title: Network Packet Capture Capability
requirements.description: Implement packet capture capability at critical network points with adequate retention for forensic investigation.

requirements.title: NTP Synchronisation
requirements.description: Ensure NTP synchronisation across all network devices and servers with redundant time sources for forensic accuracy.

requirements.title: DDoS Protection Measures
requirements.description: Implement multi-layered DDoS protection including on-premise mitigation, ISP-level protection, and cloud scrubbing services.

requirements.title: PII Encryption at Rest
requirements.description: Encrypt all PII and sensitive customer data at rest using AES-256 or equivalent with proper key management.

requirements.title: Encryption Key Management
requirements.description: Implement robust encryption key management including generation, storage, rotation, and destruction procedures using HSM where appropriate.

requirements.title: DLP Technology Deployment
requirements.description: Deploy DLP technology monitoring email, web, endpoint, and cloud channels for unauthorised sensitive data transmission.

requirements.title: DLP Policy for Data In-Use
requirements.description: Configure DLP policies to monitor and control sensitive data in use on endpoints including clipboard, printing, and screen capture.

requirements.title: DLP Policy for Data In-Motion
requirements.description: Configure DLP policies to detect and prevent unauthorised transmission of sensitive data via email, web, and removable media.

requirements.title: DLP Policy for Data At-Rest
requirements.description: Implement DLP scanning of data repositories to identify sensitive data stored in unauthorised locations.

requirements.title: Secure Data Removal and Disposal
requirements.description: Implement certified data destruction procedures for decommissioned media with chain of custody and certificates of destruction.

requirements.title: Data Classification Scheme
requirements.description: Establish and enforce a data classification scheme with defined sensitivity levels, handling requirements, and labelling standards.

requirements.title: Sensitive Data Inventory
requirements.description: Maintain a comprehensive inventory of sensitive data assets including location, ownership, access permissions, and data flow mapping.

requirements.title: Third-Party Data Protection Controls
requirements.description: Implement contractual and technical controls for third-party handling of sensitive data with audit rights and compliance monitoring.

requirements.title: Confidential Information Barrier Controls
requirements.description: Implement logical access controls and monitoring to enforce confidential information barriers between business units.

requirements.title: SOC Establishment
requirements.description: Establish a Security Operations Centre with defined mandate, staffing, technology stack, and operational procedures.

requirements.title: SOC 24x7 Operations
requirements.description: Ensure SOC operates on a 24x7 basis with adequate staffing for continuous monitoring and incident response.

requirements.title: SIEM Deployment
requirements.description: Deploy SIEM platform with comprehensive log ingestion from critical systems, correlation rules, and automated alerting.

requirements.title: Log Source Coverage
requirements.description: Ensure SIEM log coverage includes all critical infrastructure, applications, cloud services, and security tools.

requirements.title: Log Retention Compliance
requirements.description: Maintain security log retention meeting regulatory requirements with integrity protection and search capability.

requirements.title: Incident Triage and Classification
requirements.description: Establish SOC incident triage process with severity classification, SLA-based response times, and escalation procedures.

requirements.title: Vulnerability Management Programme
requirements.description: Maintain continuous vulnerability management programme with scanning, risk-based prioritisation, remediation tracking, and SLA compliance.

requirements.title: Proactive Threat Hunting
requirements.description: Conduct regular threat hunting campaigns to identify advanced threats evading automated detection controls.

requirements.title: Digital Forensic Readiness
requirements.description: Maintain digital forensic investigation capability with trained personnel, validated tools, and evidence handling procedures.

requirements.title: Threat Intelligence Feed Integration
requirements.description: Subscribe to and operationalise threat intelligence feeds with automated IoC ingestion into security detection tools.

requirements.title: SOC Playbook Maintenance
requirements.description: Develop and maintain SOC response playbooks covering common attack scenarios with regular testing and updates.

requirements.title: Monthly SOC Performance Reporting
requirements.description: Produce monthly SOC reports covering detection metrics, incident statistics, threat trends, and improvement actions.

requirements.title: SOC Physical Security
requirements.description: Ensure SOC facility has adequate physical security including access controls, surveillance, and environmental protections.

requirements.title: Holistic Monitoring View
requirements.description: Ensure SOC maintains visibility across all environments including on-premise, cloud, hybrid, and third-party hosted systems.

requirements.title: VAPT Standard Operating Procedures
requirements.description: Establish comprehensive VAPT SOPs covering scope, methodology, tools, reporting, and remediation tracking.

requirements.title: Quarterly Vulnerability Assessment
requirements.description: Conduct quarterly vulnerability assessments of all in-scope infrastructure and applications with authenticated scanning.

requirements.title: Vulnerability Remediation SLAs
requirements.description: Define and enforce vulnerability remediation SLAs based on severity: critical within 7 days, high within 30 days, medium within 90 days.

requirements.title: Annual External Penetration Test
requirements.description: Conduct annual penetration testing by qualified external testers covering critical systems with realistic attack simulation.

requirements.title: Penetration Tester Qualifications
requirements.description: Ensure penetration testers hold recognised certifications (CREST, OSCP, GPEN) and demonstrate relevant sector experience.

requirements.title: Pre-Launch Security Testing
requirements.description: Conduct penetration testing on all new applications and significant changes before production deployment.

requirements.title: Critical Finding Escalation
requirements.description: Escalate critical penetration test findings to CISO within 24 hours with remediation plan and timeline.

requirements.title: Compromise Assessment
requirements.description: Conduct periodic compromise assessments to identify evidence of past or ongoing breaches in the environment.

requirements.title: Crowdsourced Security Testing
requirements.description: Implement vulnerability disclosure policy and consider crowdsourced security testing for public-facing systems.

requirements.title: API Inventory Maintenance
requirements.description: Maintain a comprehensive inventory of all APIs with classification by sensitivity, criticality, and data exposure.

requirements.title: API Availability and Resilience
requirements.description: Implement API availability controls including load balancing, auto-scaling, rate limiting, and disaster recovery provisions.

requirements.title: Secure API Development Practices
requirements.description: Enforce secure coding practices for API development addressing OWASP API Top 10 with SAST/DAST integration.

requirements.title: API Transport Encryption
requirements.description: Enforce TLS 1.2+ for all API communications with mTLS for internal API traffic handling sensitive data.

requirements.title: API Key and Certificate Management
requirements.description: Implement centralised API key and certificate management with automated rotation and lifecycle tracking.

requirements.title: API Brute Force Protection
requirements.description: Implement anti-brute-force measures on API authentication endpoints including rate limiting, lockout, and anomaly detection.

requirements.title: API Authentication Protocols
requirements.description: Implement OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect for API authentication with scope-based authorisation and token lifecycle management.

requirements.title: API Gateway Deployment
requirements.description: Deploy API gateway for centralised policy enforcement, traffic management, and security control across all API traffic.

requirements.title: API Security Assessment
requirements.description: Conduct periodic API security assessments including penetration testing, configuration review, and compliance verification.

requirements.title: API Traffic Monitoring
requirements.description: Implement continuous API traffic monitoring with anomaly detection, abuse pattern identification, and SIEM integration.

requirements.title: API Token Revocation
requirements.description: Implement robust token revocation mechanisms with emergency mass revocation capability for incident response.

requirements.title: Kill Chain Defence Mapping
requirements.description: Map defensive controls to each phase of the cyber attack kill chain to ensure detection and disruption at every stage.

requirements.title: MITRE ATT&CK Coverage Assessment
requirements.description: Assess detection coverage against MITRE ATT&CK framework and address identified gaps in defensive capabilities.

requirements.title: Continuous Security Monitoring
requirements.description: Implement continuous monitoring across all technology assets and environments with real-time alerting and response.

requirements.title: Monitoring Use Case Library
requirements.description: Develop and maintain a library of monitoring use cases covering critical threat scenarios and compliance requirements.

requirements.title: Cyber Threat Intelligence Programme
requirements.description: Establish a structured CTI programme producing actionable intelligence for defensive operations and strategic decisions.

requirements.title: Threat Intelligence Sharing Participation
requirements.description: Actively participate in threat intelligence sharing initiatives with sector peers, regulators, and national CERTs.

requirements.title: Anomalous Activity Detection
requirements.description: Implement behavioural analytics and anomaly detection for networks, systems, and user activities with defined response procedures.

requirements.title: Red Team Exercise Programme
requirements.description: Conduct red team exercises simulating realistic adversary tactics to validate defensive control effectiveness.

requirements.title: Cyber Crisis Management Framework
requirements.description: Establish a cyber crisis management framework with governance structures, decision authorities, and communication protocols.

requirements.title: Crisis Management Team Composition
requirements.description: Define crisis management team with representatives from IT, security, legal, communications, business, and executive leadership.

requirements.title: CIRP Establishment and Maintenance
requirements.description: Establish and maintain a comprehensive Cyber Incident Response Plan with defined phases, roles, and procedures.

requirements.title: Incident Classification and Severity Scheme
requirements.description: Define incident classification scheme with severity levels, response priorities, and notification requirements.

requirements.title: CERT Establishment and Readiness
requirements.description: Establish internal CERT with trained personnel, coordination procedures with MyCERT and sector CERT, and 24x7 readiness.

requirements.title: Out-of-Band Communication Channels
requirements.description: Establish and regularly test out-of-band communication channels for use during incidents when primary systems are compromised.

requirements.title: Annual Cyber Drill Execution
requirements.description: Conduct at least one comprehensive annual cyber drill with realistic scenarios testing response capabilities across the organisation.

requirements.title: Drill Scenario Realism
requirements.description: Develop drill scenarios based on current threat landscape with input from threat intelligence and lessons from real incidents.

requirements.title: Drill Multi-Stakeholder Participation
requirements.description: Ensure cyber drill participation from IT, security, business units, communications, senior management, and where appropriate, board members.

requirements.title: Drill Findings Board Reporting
requirements.description: Report cyber drill outcomes to the board including identified gaps, improvement recommendations, and remediation timelines.

requirements.title: Post-Incident Review Process
requirements.description: Conduct thorough post-incident reviews for all significant incidents with root cause analysis and tracked improvement actions.

requirements.title: Lessons Learned Integration
requirements.description: Ensure lessons from incidents and drills are systematically captured and integrated into training, procedures, and controls.

requirements.title: Cyber Insurance Procurement
requirements.description: Obtain cyber insurance coverage commensurate with the institution's cyber risk profile and potential loss exposure.

requirements.title: Insurance Coverage Adequacy Review
requirements.description: Annually review cyber insurance coverage adequacy against evolving risk exposure, threat landscape, and business changes.

requirements.title: Insurance T&C Legal Review
requirements.description: Conduct legal review of insurance terms, conditions, and exclusions to identify coverage gaps and negotiate improvements.

requirements.title: Policyholder Obligation Compliance
requirements.description: Track and comply with all cyber insurance policyholder obligations including security control requirements and notification timelines.

requirements.title: BNM Incident Notification
requirements.description: Notify BNM of cyber incidents within prescribed timelines using defined notification formats and channels.

requirements.title: Stakeholder Incident Communication
requirements.description: Communicate cyber incidents to relevant stakeholders including customers, partners, and law enforcement as required.

requirements.title: Industry Threat Intelligence Sharing
requirements.description: Participate actively in industry threat intelligence sharing forums and contribute actionable intelligence to sector peers.

requirements.title: Cross-Industry Cyber Collaboration
requirements.description: Establish and maintain collaborative relationships with regulators, CERTs, law enforcement, and peer institutions on cyber matters.

requirements.title: Digital Service CRF Extension
requirements.description: Extend the CRF scope to comprehensively cover all digital service delivery channels with channel-specific risk assessments.

requirements.title: Alternative Control Justification
requirements.description: Document and justify alternative controls for digital services where standard controls cannot be applied, with risk acceptance.

requirements.title: Digital Fraud Detection System
requirements.description: Implement comprehensive fraud detection covering all digital transaction channels with real-time scoring and alerting.

requirements.title: Transaction Monitoring Rules
requirements.description: Configure transaction monitoring with velocity checks, limit validation, geographic anomaly detection, and device risk scoring.

requirements.title: Mobile Application Security
requirements.description: Implement defence-in-depth for mobile banking including app hardening, RASP, certificate pinning, and integrity verification.

requirements.title: Mobile Threat Defence
requirements.description: Deploy mobile threat defence capabilities detecting compromised devices, malicious apps, and network-based attacks on mobile channels.

requirements.title: Digital Channel Surveillance
requirements.description: Implement continuous surveillance of digital service channels with real-time anomaly detection and fraud monitoring.

requirements.title: Digital Incident Response Coordination
requirements.description: Establish coordinated incident response procedures for digital channel incidents involving IT, fraud, operations, and customer service.

requirements.title: Cross-Team Incident Coordination
requirements.description: Ensure coordinated response across IT security, fraud management, customer operations, and communications during digital incidents.

requirements.title: Digital Security Board Reporting
requirements.description: Report digital service security posture, fraud trends, and incident statistics to senior management and board regularly.

requirements.title: Fraud Detection Rule Updates
requirements.description: Regularly update fraud detection rules and models based on emerging fraud typologies, incident learnings, and threat intelligence.

requirements.title: Secure Customer Communication Channels
requirements.description: Implement secure communication channels with customers including authenticated messaging and anti-phishing measures.

requirements.title: Customer Self-Service Security Controls
requirements.description: Provide customers with self-service security controls including transaction limits, device management, and notification preferences.

requirements.title: Kill Switch Implementation
requirements.description: Implement customer-accessible kill switch mechanism enabling immediate suspension of digital services in case of suspected compromise.

requirements.title: Customer Incident Notification
requirements.description: Establish procedures for timely notification and guidance to customers affected by cyber incidents involving digital services.

requirements.title: Post-Incident Customer Protection
requirements.description: Implement post-incident customer protection measures including account recovery, fraud reimbursement, and enhanced monitoring.

requirements.title: Staff Cybersecurity Awareness Programme
requirements.description: Implement mandatory cybersecurity awareness programme for all staff with annual training and regular reinforcement campaigns.

requirements.title: Phishing Simulation Programme
requirements.description: Conduct regular phishing simulation exercises with targeted remedial training for staff who fail simulations.

requirements.title: Technical Staff Security Training
requirements.description: Provide specialised cybersecurity training and certification opportunities for technical staff aligned with role requirements.

requirements.title: Board Cybersecurity Education
requirements.description: Provide regular cybersecurity education to board members covering threat landscape, regulatory developments, and strategic risk.

requirements.title: Third-Party Security Awareness
requirements.description: Extend cybersecurity awareness requirements to third-party service providers and contractors with system or data access.

requirements.title: Security Awareness Effectiveness Measurement
requirements.description: Measure and report on security awareness programme effectiveness through metrics including phishing click rates, incident reporting rates, and knowledge assessments.
